languages.text: "Why shouldn't I simply execute the colonel?"

traits.locale_text: "Why shouldn't I simply execute the colonel?"
"Why shouldn't I simply execute the colonel? I could easily have Batoshski charged with the heresy of secession and the blasphemy of insubordination."
"Why shouldn't I simply execute the colonel? I could easily have Batoshski charged with the heresy of secession and the blasphemy of insubordination."
"Why shouldn't I simply execute the colonel?"
"Why shouldn't I simply execute the colonel?"

languages.text: 「なぜ大佐をただちに処刑してはならぬのだ？ バトシュスキーなら、離反という異端と抗命という冒涜罪で、容易く罪に問える」
languages.original_text: "Why shouldn't I simply execute the colonel? I could easily have Batoshski charged with the heresy of secession and the blasphemy of insubordination."

traits.locale_text: 「なぜ大佐をただちに処刑してはならぬのだ？ バトシュスキーなら、離反という異端と抗命という冒涜罪で、容易く罪に問える。」

languages.text: « Qu'est-ce qui m'empêche d'exécuter le colonel, tout simplement ? Je pourrais facilement l'accuser d'être un hérétique coupable de sécession ou du blasphème de l'insubordination. »
languages.original_text: "Why shouldn't I simply execute the colonel? I could easily have Batoshski charged with the heresy of secession and the blasphemy of insubordination."

traits.locale_text: « Qu'est-ce qui m'empêche d'exécuter le colonel, tout simplement ? Je pourrais facilement l'accuser d'être un hérétique coupable de sécession ou du blasphème de l'insubordination. »

languages.original_text: "Why shouldn't I simply execute the colonel?"

traits.locale_text: "Neden albayı infaz etmiyorum? Batoshski'yi kolayca ayrılıkçılık kâfirliğinden ve itaatsizlikten suçlayabilirim."

languages.text: "Warum sollte ich den Colonel nicht einfach exekutieren?"
languages.original_text: "Why shouldn't I simply execute the colonel?"

traits.locale_text: "Warum sollte ich den Colonel nicht einfach exekutieren? Ich könnte Batoshski problemlos der Ketzerei der Sezession und der Blasphemie der Insubordination anklagen."

languages.text: «¿Y por qué no debería ejecutar al coronel? Podría acusar a Batoshski de la herejía de la secesión y la blasfemia de la insubordinación».
languages.original_text: "Why shouldn't I simply execute the colonel? I could easily have Batoshski charged with the heresy of secession and the blasphemy of insubordination."

traits.locale_text: «¿Y por qué no debería ejecutar al coronel? Podría acusar a Batoshski de la herejía de la secesión y la blasfemia de la insubordinación».

languages.original_text: "Why shouldn't I simply execute the colonel?"

traits.locale_text: “我何不直接处决上校？我大可以分裂异端和抗命亵渎的罪名指控巴托什斯基。”
